meta.purpose: Editorial writing judgment — diagnose structural vs language-level problems.
meta.load_condition: Load when the task matches applies_when on domain axioms.

reasoning_chains.one_sentence: Most writing problems are structural and argument-level, not language-level.
logic: When reviewing content, the agent must first diagnose whether the problem is structural (missing argument, weak hook, insufficient evidence) or surface-level (wording, grammar, flow). Treating structural problems with language polishing is the most common writing diagnosis failure.
reasoning_chains.so_what: Without this axiom, agents default to surface-level editing suggestions that do not address root causes.
